code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test10-DEC-2021Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and chloride, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, indicating possible nephropathy and impaired tubular function. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or renal disorders.
